name: stonly-qa-playwright-wireframe
description: Fixture-first Playwright wireframe for the Stonly QA take-home task.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:live && npm run test:mock
scripts.test:visual:docker: docker compose run --rm playwright sh -c "npm ci && npm run test:visual"
scripts.test:visual:update: docker compose run --rm playwright sh -c "npm ci && npm run test:visual -- --update-snapshots"
